title: Splatcraft Modded Mayhem
description: The official modpack needed to join the Splatcraft Modded Mayhem event.
body: This modpack is the official modpack required to join the Splatcraft Modded Mayhem event hosted by the Splatcraft Modding Team. The event will be one month long, with the mods in this modpack being enabled slowly as the weeks of the event progress.
